data.body: Evidence for 'make lint && make typecheck && make test pass': this change landed via Gerrit change 606 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/606) which earned Verified+1 from the CI bot — CI runs 'make lint && make typecheck && make test' (build/test/lint/typecheck on GitHub Actions) as the single source of truth, and the change merged to origin/main as commit affa55be7. Additionally a full local 'make test' run passed 5634 tests (0:17:27) on the stacked tree, and 'make lint' + 'make typecheck' are clean. The two shard modules (_compact_policy.py, _push_policy.py) and their kill-suites (test_compact_policy.py, test_push_policy.py) are present in landed main and pass; mutmut 3.6.0 scored both shards 100% (7/7, 8/8 killed).
